title: athlete — product analytics

events.name: Athlete Created
events.description: age_bucket is pre-computed (under_10 / 10_to_14 / 15_to_17 / 18_to_25 / 26_plus) to avoid high-cardinality DOB / age labels.

events.name: Athlete Paused For Safeguarding
events.description: Consent tier: essential — safeguarding pause frequency is a compliance signal. Never carries the paused_reason string.

events.name: Athlete Medical Updated
events.description: PRIVATE-TIER analytics — payload NEVER carries the medical values. Only the FACT that a change happened + which fields. Consent tier: essential (medical-change frequency is a safeguarding signal that cannot be opted out).

notes: Analytics NEVER carry raw medical_* values — the Athlete Medical Updated event uses only fact-of-change + field count. Prevents accidental exposure via the analytics sink.

athlete_id + user_id are hashed (SHA-256) at emit-time when the consent tier is 'functional' or higher — first-party operational analytics per notifications::consent-tiers.json. Never sent as raw ULIDs.

The 'essential' consent tier for Athlete Paused For Safeguarding + Athlete Medical Updated + Athlete Consent Revoked is deliberate — compliance signals cannot be opted out. Applies platform-side observability, not tenant-visible dashboards.
For minors, the tenant_id + branch_id remain in the payload but NO athlete-identifying fields (age_bucket is coarse; no first_name / last_name / DOB / user_id). Aligns with regulated_minor tier.
